note: Phase 1 seed. Staticcheck checks partition by prefix: SA (correctness), S (simple), ST (stylecheck), U (unused), QF (quickfix). Hydra R3 owns CWE-tagged security lanes — any SA-rule with an overt injection/crypto framing belongs to Hydra.

correctness_m1.description: Staticcheck SA-series — runtime-failure candidates (nil deref, invalid args, misuse of sync primitives). Routed to M1 / M5.

idiom_m7.description: Staticcheck ST-series — idiomatic Go style. Routed to M7 (Idiom-fit).

complexity_m7.description: Cyclomatic / cognitive complexity signals from companion linters (gocyclo, cyclop, cocognit). Routed to M7 (Simplicity).

naming_m7.description: Naming-convention subset of ST-series. Routed to M7 (Clarity).

testability_m7.description: Test-structure signals (missing t.Helper, mis-scoped subtests, untested exported APIs). Routed to M7 (Testability). Phase 1 seed.

security_defer_to_hydra.description: gosec G-series and staticcheck crypto/auth rules — Hydra R3 owns these (CWE lane). Listed for provenance; never mapped.
